title: CI is green on the candidate build — ship to production, or hold?
body: The candidate build for #142 passed all checks. Ship it to production now, hold for a human review, or abort?

state.note: Opaque to the Hub; AEAD-sealed by the agent with a key the Hub never sees (spec §9.3).

options.label: Ship to prod now
options.description: Promote the candidate build to production immediately.

options.label: Hold for review
options.description: Wait for a human to review before deploying.
